headline: Enzo Fernández — update
body: 🚨⚪️ Enzo Fernández, still in a four men shortlist at Real Madrid waiting on final decision — and also on exits in midfield. Nico Páz could stay at Como, Dani Ceballos will leave, more to follow. No club to club talks with Chelsea at this st
text:
🚨⚪️ Enzo Fernández, still in a four men shortlist at Real Madrid waiting on final decision — and also on exits in midfield.

Nico Páz could stay at Como, Dani Ceballos will leave, more to follow.

No club to club talks with Chelsea at this stage.

🎥 https://t.co/64SiHOCTMn https://t.co/8qoHiPRXpX
